_comment: Site equipment ontology override. Point IKI_EQUIPMENT_ONTOLOGY_PATH at a copy of this file to calibrate entity extraction to your plant's tag conventions. 'aliases' map a spelled-out equipment noun to its canonical tag prefix so 'Cooling Tower 3' resolves to the same entity as 'CT-3'. 'prefixes' are short tag prefixes treated as equipment (not vendor part numbers). Both are merged over the built-in ISA-5.1 defaults.
